certification_basis: The AiGOL CLI exposes plan list, plan show, plan approved, plan chain, plan bridge, plan execution-request, and plan latest commands.
The command group reconstructs implementation plan visibility from replay-visible implementation plan, bridge link, and implementation-plan-derived execution request artifacts.
Replay wrapper hashes and relevant artifact hashes are validated before display.
Plan text, plan scope, plan constraints, planned artifact target, and planned validation hashes are validated before display.
Missing plan, bridge, or execution request references fail closed.
The command group does not dispatch, invoke, execute, mutate governance, mutate replay, create execution requests, or bypass approval or bridge runtimes.
known_limitations: The command group is inspection-only and does not create, approve, reject, or authorize implementation plans.
Bridge and execution request filters depend on replay-visible bridge link and execution request artifacts already produced by governed runtimes.
The command group does not replace full lineage reconstruction; operators should use show-full-lineage for cross-lifecycle lineage inspection.
